description: Perform morning shift alarm triage. Read the shift handover document at ~/Desktop/morning_shift_triage.txt. Log into OpManager (http://localhost:8060, credentials: admin/Admin@123) and navigate to the Alarms view. Acknowledge the active alarms for Core-Switch-01, DB-Node-01, and SAN-Storage-01, and add the exact note 'Maintenance CHG-90210' to each. Clear the active alarms for Edge-Router-VPN and Web-Proxy-01 completely. Do not modify any other alarms.
